response.step_by_step_log: Identified two songs being sung in a virtual karaoke setting: 'Fly Me to the Moon' (Song 1) and 'BANDAGE' (Song 2) based on on-screen text. Performed separate web searches for both songs using the template: '[Song Title] Japanese and English lyrics'. Found reliable lyric sources for both. Song 1 is a classic jazz standard often adapted, and Song 2 is by Ayumu Imazu.
response.global_summary: A video segment featuring multiple Hololive VTubers singing a two-song medley in a virtual karaoke room, with dialogue intervals.

scenes.description: VTubers singing 'Fly Me to the Moon' in a pink-lit karaoke room.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
教えて Moon light
今日の続き 明日 どんな私になる？
背のびしても まだ夜明けの
空は見えないわ…
でも信じてるの
Doki meki kokoro o hako n deku
Fly me to the moon
Tobi dasuno yo
Tsuki tokei tyoodo
Hajimari no toki
Fly me to the dream
Tobu n de yuku wa
Hoshizora no arch kie nai uti ni
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Tell me, Moon light
What kind of me will I be tomorrow, continuing from today?
Even if I stand on tiptoes, the dawn
Sky is still not visible...
But I believe
Carrying my heart, beating fast
Fly me to the moon
I'll fly out
The moon clock is just right
Time for the beginning
Fly me to the dream
I'll fly away
Before the arch of the starry sky disappears

scenes.description: VTubers performing 'BANDAGE' with on-screen lyrics and dance choreography.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Sit up 姿勢正して
ひねくれた態度じゃ
不合格です
不幸中の幸いは
飽きてしまうわ
Get up 目を覚まして
いい加減な言いなりに
黙ってうなづいてちゃ
No, no, no 伸び代がないわ
I got 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
Things on my mind
思考 一向にまとまらない
What do I do
Running I'm running away
追いかける yesterday
決める覚悟 迷いは捨て
'Cause it's gonna hurt more
The longer you wait
駆け引きなんていらない
Say whatcha wanna say
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Sit up, straighten your posture
With that twisted attitude,
You're failing
The silver lining in this misfortune is
I'll get bored of it
Get up, wake up
Just nodding silently
To careless obedience
No, no, no, there's no room for growth
I got 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
Things on my mind
My thoughts won't come together at all
What do I do
Running, I'm running away
Chasing yesterday
Decide to decide, discard the hesitation
'Cause it's gonna hurt more
The longer you wait
I don't need any mind games
Say whatcha wanna say
